bot_answer: Alea Henle was named the new head of the Access & Borrow department, which encompasses circulation [2]. The staff directory page is the place to look up the current head of circulation [1].
The dean of the Miami University Libraries in Oxford is Jerome U. Conley, listed as Dean & University Librarian [3][4].
Yes — the Ask Us page offers online chat with a librarian [1][2]. You can also use the Ask Us contact options for email, appointment, or phone help [2].
